discoveries.name: Claude Code Security
discoveries.oneliner: AI finds zero-day vulnerabilities humans missed for decades
discoveries.description: Launched Feb 20, 2026. Claude Opus 4.6 found 500+ high-severity zero-days in production open-source software. Caused a flash crash in cybersecurity stocks.
discoveries.whyHot: 500+ zero-days humans missed. Cybersecurity stocks crashed on launch. Paradigm shift in vulnerability discovery.
discoveries.moneyPotential: Security audit services: $2K-$10K per codebase. SaaS continuous scanning: $200-$500/month.

discoveries.name: MCP Server Empire
discoveries.oneliner: Build once, sell forever — the AI plugin gold rush
discoveries.description: 97 million monthly SDK downloads, 10,000+ servers. Marketplaces let devs monetize with pay-per-invocation. One dev: $500/mo to $2K/mo on Apify alone.
discoveries.whyHot: MCP is the USB-C of AI. Every major company adopted it. Building now = iOS apps in 2009.
discoveries.moneyPotential: Niche MCP servers: $500-$2K/month passive. Vertical agents: $399/month × 35 clients = $167K+ ARR.

discoveries.name: Cline CLI 2.0
discoveries.oneliner: Open-source parallel multi-agent coding in your terminal
discoveries.description: Parallel agent execution. Multiple AI agents simultaneously. Supports every major model. Full MCP integration. All free and open-source.
discoveries.whyHot: Parallel agents = swarm development. Model-agnostic. 10x developer throughput for free.
discoveries.moneyPotential: 3-5x more freelance projects. Sell workflow templates. Premium AI-augmented dev services.

discoveries.name: AI Booking Bot Factory
discoveries.oneliner: Build $400/month chatbots for local businesses in minutes
discoveries.description: No-code platforms let you build booking bots in minutes. A wellness studio pays $400/month for a 10-minute build. 80% of inquiries automatable.
discoveries.whyHot: 10 minutes work → $400/month recurring. Zero technical barrier. Walk into any local business.
discoveries.moneyPotential: $300-$500/month per client. 20 clients = $96K/year. Near-zero acquisition cost.

discoveries.name: Claude Agent SDK Teams
discoveries.oneliner: Build autonomous agent teams that research, code, and ship
discoveries.description: Build agents with Claude Code's full power. Multi-agent orchestration. Microsoft Semantic Kernel integration. Devs earning $2K-$8K/month.
discoveries.whyHot: Build products that work like Claude Code itself. Multi-agent = manager delegating to specialists.
discoveries.moneyPotential: Vertical AI products: $500-$2K/month SaaS. Security bots, research generators, oncall assistants.
